content.text:
To check for available package updates on Arch Linux:

**Check for updates without installing:**
```bash
pacman -Qu
```
Lists packages with available upgrades.

```bash
pacman -Sy && pacman -Qu
```
Syncs the database first, then lists outdated packages.

**Using `checkupdates` (safer, no root needed):**
```bash
checkupdates
```
This is the recommended way — it syncs a temporary copy of the package database without modifying the system. Part of the `pacman-contrib` package.

```bash
# Install if not already present
sudo pacman -S pacman-contrib
```

**For AUR packages (if using yay/paru):**
```bash
yay -Qu      # or
paru -Qu
```

**Full upgrade (check + install):**
```bash
sudo pacman -Syu
```

The safest routine is `checkupdates` — it won't modify your package database and can be run without sudo.

1 -- Package update widget 2 -- Left-click: show available updates popup 3 -- Right-click: confirm and run paru -Syu 4 local wibox = require("wibox") 5 local awful = require("awful") 6 local gears = require("gears") 7 local naughty = require("naughty") 8 9 -- Everforest colors 10 local bg_widget = "#425047" 11 local bg_popup = "#2D353B" 12 local bg_row = "#374247" 13 local fg_color = "#D3C6AA" 14 local fg_green = "#A7C080" 15 local fg_yellow = "#DBBC7F" 16 local fg_grey = "#7A8478" 17 18 local CHECK_INTERVAL = 300 -- seconds between checks 19 20 local updates = {} -- list of { name, current, latest } 21 local popup = nil 22 23 -- Widget label 24 local pkg_label = wibox.widget.textbox() 25 local function refresh_label() 26 local count = #updates 27 pkg_label:set_markup( 28 string.format(' 📦 %d ', fg_color, count) 29 ) 30 end 31 refresh_label() 32 33 local pkg_widget = wibox.container.background( 34 wibox.container.margin(pkg_label, 2, 2), 35 bg_widget, 36 gears.shape.rounded_rect 37 ) 38 39 local close_detail -- forward declaration 40 local close_timer = nil 41 42 local function cancel_close() 43 if close_timer then 44 close_timer:stop() 45 close_timer = nil 46 end 47 end 48 49 local function schedule_close() 50 cancel_close() 51 close_timer = gears.timer.start_new(0.3, function() 52 close_timer = nil 53 if close_detail then close_detail() end 54 if popup then 55 popup.visible = false 56 popup = nil 57 end 58 return false 59 end) 60 end 61 62 -- Immediate close (used when explicitly dismissing) 63 local function close_popup() 64 cancel_close() 65 if close_detail then close_detail() end 66 if popup then 67 popup.visible = false 68 popup = nil 69 end 70 end 71 72 -- Async check for updates using paru -Qu 73 local function check_updates() 74 awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell("paru -Qu 2>/dev/null", function(stdout) 75 updates = {} 76 for line in stdout:gmatch("[^\n]+") do 77 -- paru -Qu format: "pkgname current_ver -> new_ver" 78 local name, cur, new = line:match("^(%S+)%s+(%S+)%s+%->%s+(%S+)") 79 if name then 80 table.insert(updates, { name = name, current = cur, latest = new }) 81 end 82 end 83 refresh_label() 84 end) 85 end 86 87 -- Initial check + timer 88 check_updates() 89 gears.timer { 90 timeout = CHECK_INTERVAL, 91 autostart = true, 92 callback = check_updates, 93 } 94 95 local VISIBLE_ROWS = 15 96 local scroll_offset = 0 97 local list_layout = nil -- reused to update rows in-place 98 local detail_popup = nil 99 100 close_detail = function() 101 cancel_close() 102 if detail_popup then 103 detail_popup.visible = false 104 detail_popup = nil 105 end 106 end 107 108 -- Fields from paru -Si we care about 109 local DETAIL_FIELDS = { 110 "Description", "URL", "Version", "Licenses", 111 "Maintainer", "Last Modified", "Out-of-date", 112 } 113 114 local function show_detail(pkg) 115 close_detail() 116 awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell( 117 "paru -Si " .. pkg.name .. " 2>/dev/null", 118 function(stdout) 119 local rows = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() 120 121 -- Title 122 rows:add(wibox.widget { 123 { 124 markup = string.format( 125 ' %s ' 126 .. '%s → %s', 127 fg_green, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.name), 128 fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.current), 129 gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.latest) 130 ), 131 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 132 }, 133 top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, 134 widget = wibox.container.margin, 135 }) 136 rows:add(wibox.widget { 137 color = fg_grey, forced_height = 1, 138 widget = wibox.widget.separator, 139 }) 140 141 -- Parse and show selected fields 142 local found_any = false 143 for _, field in ipairs(DETAIL_FIELDS) do 144 local val = stdout:match(field .. "%s*:%s*([^\n]+)") 145 if val and val ~= "None" and val ~= "" then 146 found_any = true 147 local trimmed = val:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") 148 local is_url = field == "URL" 149 local row = wibox.container.background( 150 wibox.container.margin( 151 wibox.widget { 152 markup = string.format( 153 '%-14s ' 154 .. '%s', 155 fg_grey, 156 gears.string.xml_escape(field), 157 is_url and "#7FBBB3" or fg_color, 158 gears.string.xml_escape(trimmed) 159 ), 160 wrap = "word_char", 161 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 162 }, 163 6, 6, 2, 2 164 ), 165 "#232A2E" 166 ) 167 if is_url then 168 local url = trimmed 169 row:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() row.bg = "#2e3e43" end) 170 row:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() row.bg = "#232A2E" end) 171 row:connect_signal("button::press", function(_, _, _, btn) 172 if btn == 1 then 173 awful.spawn("xdg-open " .. url) 174 close_detail() 175 end 176 end) 177 end 178 rows:add(row) 179 end 180 end 181 182 if not found_any then 183 rows:add(wibox.widget { 184 { 185 markup = string.format( 186 ' No details available ', 187 fg_grey 188 ), 189 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 190 }, 191 top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, 192 widget = wibox.container.margin, 193 }) 194 end 195 196 detail_popup = awful.popup { 197 widget = { 198 rows, 199 bg = "#232A2E", 200 widget = wibox.container.background, 201 }, 202 placement = function(w) 203 awful.placement.top_right(w, { 204 honor_workarea = true, 205 margins = { top = 18, right = 410 }, 206 }) 207 end, 208 shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, 209 border_width = 2, 210 border_color = fg_green, 211 ontop = true, 212 visible = true, 213 minimum_width = 260, 214 maximum_width = 420, 215 } 216 detail_popup:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() cancel_close() end) 217 detail_popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() schedule_close() end) 218 end 219 ) 220 end 221 222 local function make_pkg_row(pkg) 223 local row_bg = wibox.container.background( 224 wibox.container.margin( 225 wibox.widget { 226 markup = string.format( 227 '%-30s ' 228 .. '%s' 229 .. ' → ' 230 .. '%s', 231 fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.name), 232 fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.current), 233 fg_grey, 234 fg_yellow, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.latest) 235 ), 236 wrap = "word_char", 237 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 238 }, 239 6, 6, 3, 3 240 ), 241 bg_row 242 ) 243 row_bg:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() row_bg.bg = "#4a5e53" end) 244 row_bg:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() row_bg.bg = bg_row end) 245 row_bg:connect_signal("button::press", function(_, _, _, btn) 246 if btn == 1 then show_detail(pkg) end 247 end) 248 return row_bg 249 end 250 251 local function fill_list() 252 list_layout:reset() 253 local total = #updates 254 local last = math.min(scroll_offset + VISIBLE_ROWS, total) 255 for i = scroll_offset + 1, last do 256 list_layout:add(make_pkg_row(updates[i])) 257 end 258 -- Scroll hint 259 if total > VISIBLE_ROWS then 260 list_layout:add(wibox.widget { 261 { 262 markup = string.format( 263 ' ↕ %d–%d of %d ', 264 fg_grey, scroll_offset + 1, last, total 265 ), 266 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 267 }, 268 top = 2, bottom = 2, left = 6, right = 6, 269 widget = wibox.container.margin, 270 }) 271 end 272 end 273 274 -- Build and show the updates popup 275 local function show_popup() 276 close_popup() 277 scroll_offset = 0 278 list_layout = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() 279 280 local header = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() 281 282 -- Title row 283 header:add(wibox.widget { 284 { 285 markup = string.format( 286 ' Available updates (%d) ', 287 fg_green, #updates 288 ), 289 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 290 }, 291 top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, 292 widget = wibox.container.margin, 293 }) 294 header:add(wibox.widget { 295 color = fg_grey, 296 forced_height = 1, 297 widget = wibox.widget.separator, 298 }) 299 300 if #updates == 0 then 301 list_layout:add(wibox.widget { 302 { 303 markup = string.format( 304 ' System is up to date ', 305 fg_grey 306 ), 307 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 308 }, 309 top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, 310 widget = wibox.container.margin, 311 }) 312 else 313 fill_list() 314 end 315 316 local root_layout = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() 317 root_layout:add(header) 318 root_layout:add(list_layout) 319 320 popup = awful.popup { 321 widget = { 322 root_layout, 323 bg = bg_popup, 324 widget = wibox.container.background, 325 }, 326 placement = function(w) 327 awful.placement.top_right(w, { 328 honor_workarea = true, 329 margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, 330 }) 331 end, 332 shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, 333 border_width = 2, 334 border_color = fg_green, 335 ontop = true, 336 visible = true, 337 minimum_width = 300, 338 maximum_width = 500, 339 } 340 341 popup:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() cancel_close() end) 342 popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() schedule_close() end) 343 popup:buttons(gears.table.join( 344 -- scroll down 345 awful.button({}, 5, function() 346 if scroll_offset + VISIBLE_ROWS < #updates then 347 scroll_offset = scroll_offset + 3 348 fill_list() 349 end 350 end), 351 -- scroll up 352 awful.button({}, 4, function() 353 if scroll_offset > 0 then 354 scroll_offset = math.max(0, scroll_offset - 3) 355 fill_list() 356 end 357 end) 358 )) 359 end 360 361 -- Button bindings 362 pkg_widget:buttons(gears.table.join( 363 awful.button({}, 1, function() 364 if popup then close_popup() else show_popup() end 365 end), 366 awful.button({}, 3, function() 367 local confirm_popup 368 369 local yes_btn = wibox.container.background( 370 wibox.container.margin( 371 wibox.widget { 372 markup = string.format('Yes', fg_green), 373 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 374 }, 375 8, 8, 3, 3 376 ), 377 "#374247", 378 gears.shape.rounded_rect 379 ) 380 381 local no_btn = wibox.container.background( 382 wibox.container.margin( 383 wibox.widget { 384 markup = string.format('No', "#E67E80"), 385 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 386 }, 387 8, 8, 3, 3 388 ), 389 "#374247", 390 gears.shape.rounded_rect 391 ) 392 393 yes_btn:connect_signal("button::press", function() 394 confirm_popup.visible = false 395 close_popup() 396 naughty.notify({ title = "Packages", text = "Update started…" }) 397 awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell("paru -Syu --noconfirm 2>&1", function(stdout, _, _, code) 398 if code == 0 then 399 naughty.notify({ title = "Packages", text = "System updated successfully." }) 400 else 401 naughty.notify({ 402 title = "Packages", 403 text = "Update failed:\n" .. stdout:sub(1, 200), 404 timeout = 10, 405 }) 406 end 407 check_updates() 408 end) 409 end) 410 yes_btn:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() yes_btn.bg = "#4a5e53" end) 411 yes_btn:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() yes_btn.bg = "#374247" end) 412 413 no_btn:connect_signal("button::press", function() 414 confirm_popup.visible = false 415 end) 416 no_btn:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() no_btn.bg = "#4a5e53" end) 417 no_btn:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() no_btn.bg = "#374247" end) 418 419 confirm_popup = awful.popup { 420 widget = wibox.container.margin( 421 wibox.widget { 422 wibox.container.margin( 423 wibox.widget { 424 markup = string.format( 425 'Run paru -Syu (%d updates)?', 426 fg_color, #updates 427 ), 428 widget = wibox.widget.textbox, 429 }, 430 0, 0, 0, 6 431 ), 432 wibox.container.place( 433 wibox.widget { 434 yes_btn, 435 wibox.container.margin(no_btn, 8, 0, 0, 0), 436 layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal, 437 } 438 ), 439 layout = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical, 440 }, 441 10, 10, 8, 8 442 ), 443 placement = function(w) 444 awful.placement.top_right(w, { 445 honor_workarea = true, 446 margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, 447 }) 448 end, 449 shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, 450 border_width = 2, 451 border_color = fg_green, 452 bg = bg_popup, 453 ontop = true, 454 visible = true, 455 } 456 457 confirm_popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() 458 confirm_popup.visible = false 459 end) 460 end) 461 )) 462 463 return pkg_widget 464

file.content: -- Package update widget -- Left-click: show available updates popup -- Right-click: confirm and run paru -Syu local wibox = require("wibox") local awful = require("awful") local gears = require("gears") local naughty = require("naughty") -- Everforest colors local bg_widget = "#425047" local bg_popup = "#2D353B" local bg_row = "#374247" local fg_color = "#D3C6AA" local fg_green = "#A7C080" local fg_yellow = "#DBBC7F" local fg_grey = "#7A8478" local CHECK_INTERVAL = 300 -- seconds between checks local updates = {} -- list of { name, current, latest } local popup = nil -- Widget label local pkg_label = wibox.widget.textbox() local function refresh_label() local count = #updates pkg_label:set_markup( string.format(' 📦 %d ', fg_color, count) ) end refresh_label() local pkg_widget = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin(pkg_label, 2, 2), bg_widget, gears.shape.rounded_rect ) local close_detail -- forward declaration local close_timer = nil local function cancel_close() if close_timer then close_timer:stop() close_timer = nil end end local function schedule_close() cancel_close() close_timer = gears.timer.start_new(0.3, function() close_timer = nil if close_detail then close_detail() end if popup then popup.visible = false popup = nil end return false end) end -- Immediate close (used when explicitly dismissing) local function close_popup() cancel_close() if close_detail then close_detail() end if popup then popup.visible = false popup = nil end end -- Async check for updates using paru -Qu local function check_updates() awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell("paru -Qu 2>/dev/null", function(stdout) updates = {} for line in stdout:gmatch("[^\n]+") do -- paru -Qu format: "pkgname current_ver -> new_ver" local name, cur, new = line:match("^(%S+)%s+(%S+)%s+%->%s+(%S+)") if name then table.insert(updates, { name = name, current = cur, latest = new }) end end refresh_label() end) end -- Initial check + timer check_updates() gears.timer { timeout = CHECK_INTERVAL, autostart = true, callback = check_updates, } local VISIBLE_ROWS = 15 local scroll_offset = 0 local list_layout = nil -- reused to update rows in-place local detail_popup = nil close_detail = function() cancel_close() if detail_popup then detail_popup.visible = false detail_popup = nil end end -- Fields from paru -Si we care about local DETAIL_FIELDS = { "Description", "URL", "Version", "Licenses", "Maintainer", "Last Modified", "Out-of-date", } local function show_detail(pkg) close_detail() awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell( "paru -Si " .. pkg.name .. " 2>/dev/null", function(stdout) local rows = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() -- Title rows:add(wibox.widget { { markup = string.format( ' %s ' .. '%s → %s', fg_green, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.name), fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.current), gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.latest) ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, widget = wibox.container.margin, }) rows:add(wibox.widget { color = fg_grey, forced_height = 1, widget = wibox.widget.separator, }) -- Parse and show selected fields local found_any = false for _, field in ipairs(DETAIL_FIELDS) do local val = stdout:match(field .. "%s*:%s*([^\n]+)") if val and val ~= "None" and val ~= "" then found_any = true local trimmed = val:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") local is_url = field == "URL" local row = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget { markup = string.format( '%-14s ' .. '%s', fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(field), is_url and "#7FBBB3" or fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(trimmed) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, 6, 6, 2, 2 ), "#232A2E" ) if is_url then local url = trimmed row:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() row.bg = "#2e3e43" end) row:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() row.bg = "#232A2E" end) row:connect_signal("button::press", function(_, _, _, btn) if btn == 1 then awful.spawn("xdg-open " .. url) close_detail() end end) end rows:add(row) end end if not found_any then rows:add(wibox.widget { { markup = string.format( ' No details available ', fg_grey ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, widget = wibox.container.margin, }) end detail_popup = awful.popup { widget = { rows, bg = "#232A2E", widget = wibox.container.background, }, placement = function(w) awful.placement.top_right(w, { honor_workarea = true, margins = { top = 18, right = 410 }, }) end, shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, border_width = 2, border_color = fg_green, ontop = true, visible = true, minimum_width = 260, maximum_width = 420, } detail_popup:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() cancel_close() end) detail_popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() schedule_close() end) end ) end local function make_pkg_row(pkg) local row_bg = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget { markup = string.format( '%-30s ' .. '%s' .. ' → ' .. '%s', fg_color, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.name), fg_grey, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.current), fg_grey, fg_yellow, gears.string.xml_escape(pkg.latest) ), wrap = "word_char", widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, 6, 6, 3, 3 ), bg_row ) row_bg:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() row_bg.bg = "#4a5e53" end) row_bg:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() row_bg.bg = bg_row end) row_bg:connect_signal("button::press", function(_, _, _, btn) if btn == 1 then show_detail(pkg) end end) return row_bg end local function fill_list() list_layout:reset() local total = #updates local last = math.min(scroll_offset + VISIBLE_ROWS, total) for i = scroll_offset + 1, last do list_layout:add(make_pkg_row(updates[i])) end -- Scroll hint if total > VISIBLE_ROWS then list_layout:add(wibox.widget { { markup = string.format( ' ↕ %d–%d of %d ', fg_grey, scroll_offset + 1, last, total ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, top = 2, bottom = 2, left = 6, right = 6, widget = wibox.container.margin, }) end end -- Build and show the updates popup local function show_popup() close_popup() scroll_offset = 0 list_layout = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() local header = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() -- Title row header:add(wibox.widget { { markup = string.format( ' Available updates (%d) ', fg_green, #updates ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, widget = wibox.container.margin, }) header:add(wibox.widget { color = fg_grey, forced_height = 1, widget = wibox.widget.separator, }) if #updates == 0 then list_layout:add(wibox.widget { { markup = string.format( ' System is up to date ', fg_grey ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, top = 4, bottom = 4, left = 6, right = 6, widget = wibox.container.margin, }) else fill_list() end local root_layout = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical() root_layout:add(header) root_layout:add(list_layout) popup = awful.popup { widget = { root_layout, bg = bg_popup, widget = wibox.container.background, }, placement = function(w) awful.placement.top_right(w, { honor_workarea = true, margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, }) end, shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, border_width = 2, border_color = fg_green, ontop = true, visible = true, minimum_width = 300, maximum_width = 500, } popup:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() cancel_close() end) popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() schedule_close() end) popup:buttons(gears.table.join( -- scroll down awful.button({}, 5, function() if scroll_offset + VISIBLE_ROWS < #updates then scroll_offset = scroll_offset + 3 fill_list() end end), -- scroll up awful.button({}, 4, function() if scroll_offset > 0 then scroll_offset = math.max(0, scroll_offset - 3) fill_list() end end) )) end -- Button bindings pkg_widget:buttons(gears.table.join( awful.button({}, 1, function() if popup then close_popup() else show_popup() end end), awful.button({}, 3, function() local confirm_popup local yes_btn = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget { markup = string.format('Yes', fg_green), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, 8, 8, 3, 3 ), "#374247", gears.shape.rounded_rect ) local no_btn = wibox.container.background( wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget { markup = string.format('No', "#E67E80"), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, 8, 8, 3, 3 ), "#374247", gears.shape.rounded_rect ) yes_btn:connect_signal("button::press", function() confirm_popup.visible = false close_popup() naughty.notify({ title = "Packages", text = "Update started…" }) awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell("paru -Syu --noconfirm 2>&1", function(stdout, _, _, code) if code == 0 then naughty.notify({ title = "Packages", text = "System updated successfully." }) else naughty.notify({ title = "Packages", text = "Update failed:\n" .. stdout:sub(1, 200), timeout = 10, }) end check_updates() end) end) yes_btn:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() yes_btn.bg = "#4a5e53" end) yes_btn:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() yes_btn.bg = "#374247" end) no_btn:connect_signal("button::press", function() confirm_popup.visible = false end) no_btn:connect_signal("mouse::enter", function() no_btn.bg = "#4a5e53" end) no_btn:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() no_btn.bg = "#374247" end) confirm_popup = awful.popup { widget = wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget { wibox.container.margin( wibox.widget { markup = string.format( 'Run paru -Syu (%d updates)?', fg_color, #updates ), widget = wibox.widget.textbox, }, 0, 0, 0, 6 ), wibox.container.place( wibox.widget { yes_btn, wibox.container.margin(no_btn, 8, 0, 0, 0), layout = wibox.layout.fixed.horizontal, } ), layout = wibox.layout.fixed.vertical, }, 10, 10, 8, 8 ), placement = function(w) awful.placement.top_right(w, { honor_workarea = true, margins = { top = 18, right = 0 }, }) end, shape = gears.shape.rounded_rect, border_width = 2, border_color = fg_green, bg = bg_popup, ontop = true, visible = true, } confirm_popup:connect_signal("mouse::leave", function() confirm_popup.visible = false end) end) )) return pkg_widget

content.text:
Yes, I can see it. Your `pkg_widget.lua` is at `themes/everforest/widgets_config/pkg_widget.lua`.

Here's what it does:

- **Checks for updates** every 5 minutes using `paru -Qu` and shows a count in the wibar as `📦 N`
- **Left-click** — opens a popup listing all packages with `current → latest` versions. You can scroll through it and click any package to see details (`paru -Si`)
- **Right-click** — shows a confirmation dialog, then runs `paru -Syu --noconfirm` to upgrade everything

It uses `paru` as the AUR helper. Is there something specific you want to change or fix with it?

message.content:
if i use right click to update packages 
does it confirm back when its finished and updated ?

content.text:
Yes, it does. Looking at lines 396–408:

```lua
naughty.notify({ title = "Packages", text = "Update started…" })
awful.spawn.easy_async_with_shell("paru -Syu --noconfirm 2>&1", function(stdout, _, _, code)
    if code == 0 then
        naughty.notify({ title = "Packages", text = "System updated successfully." })
    else
        naughty.notify({
            title   = "Packages",
            text    = "Update failed:\n" .. stdout:sub(1, 200),
            timeout = 10,
        })
    end
    check_updates()
end)
```

- Sends a **"Update started…"** notification immediately
- On success → **"System updated successfully."** notification
- On failure → **"Update failed: \<first 200 chars of output\>"** notification (stays for 10s)
- Either way, it re-runs `check_updates()` to refresh the package count in the wibar

lastPrompt: if i use right click to update packages  does it confirm back when its finished and updated ?
